code_usability.detail: No code generated; Mode A skill

functional_suitability.note: Description too brief — one sentence without trigger phrases

reliability.note: Invention-prevention rule is the primary reliability safeguard; scope appropriately narrow

agent_specific.note: Focus on research-in-progress structuring rather than polished presentation design

assertions.text: Core assertion 1 for variant a input
Core assertion 2 for variant a input
Core assertion 3 for variant a input
Core assertion 4 for variant a input
Core assertion 5 for variant a input
Core assertion 1 for variant b input
Core assertion 2 for variant b input
Core assertion 3 for variant b input
Core assertion 4 for variant b input
Core assertion 5 for variant b input

key_strengths: Explicit prohibition on inventing missing content prevents slide decks with fabricated results or unsupported claims
Research-in-progress framing requires honest status reporting (completed/pending/planned) for each slide
Discussion questions generation provides practical engagement value beyond pure information presentation
Scope appropriate for lab meetings — not overengineered for journal presentations

recommendations.title: One assertion failure: missing results section placeholder not handled
recommendations.problem: When key results sections are missing from the user's input, the skill sometimes generates placeholder slides with generic 'results will be shown' language without asking for the actual results first.
recommendations.root_cause: No minimum content requirement defined before generating result slides.
recommendations.fix: Add a content requirement check: if a results section is referenced in the study summary but no actual results are provided, ask the user to provide the key result before generating that slide, rather than using placeholder language.

recommendations.title: Description too brief to trigger for lab meeting or progress review scenarios
recommendations.problem: One-sentence description does not include natural trigger phrases.
recommendations.fix: Add trigger phrases: 'lab meeting slides', 'progress update', 'group meeting presentation', 'project review deck', 'preliminary results presentation'.
